description: Intentional Content Health warning baseline for Decantr V2 registry certification. New warning IDs must be fixed or deliberately added with rationale before release.

suppressions.rationale: Known pre-V2 registry reference debt. Tracked as an intentional warning baseline until the referenced pattern/theme catalog items are fixed or the stale references are removed.
